message:
fix(core): harden PNG parsing, fix timeout arithmetic, clean up unused
imports, and apply clippy suggestions across 6 modules

Security:
- terminal_images.rs: validate IHDR chunk marker (bytes 12..16) before
  reading PNG dimensions — prevents misinterpreting non-IHDR data as
  width/height in malformed or adversarial PNG files that have a valid
  signature but missing/reordered chunks

Correctness:
- http/client.rs: use checked_sub().unwrap_or_default() for body-read
  timeout computation to prevent panic on Duration underflow if elapsed
  exceeds timeout; gate OnceLock import behind #[cfg(not(test))] to
  eliminate dead-code warning in test builds; change bare `return None`
  to expression-position `None` for idiomatic Rust
- rpc.rs: replace Duration::from_millis(2000) with from_secs(2) for
  clarity; move `use std::time::Instant` into the #[cfg(test)] module
  where it is actually used
- ops/mitigation_synthesis.rs: use saturating_add for loss aggregation

Clippy:
- compaction.rs: use u64::saturating_add method reference instead of
  closure in fold — satisfies clippy::redundant_closure
- extensions.rs: add clippy::too_many_lines allow on
  load_js_extensions() to suppress false positive alongside existing
  significant_drop_tightening suppression
- tools.rs: remove unused `Instant` import

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
